title: Watching WTF’s AI angle
author: Serious_Truck283
selftext:
WTF is one of those names that started with meme energy but has been shifting into fintech. Beyond the ticker hype, the company has built out “Brokerage Cloud” to support other brokers and is now positioning around AI-driven brokerage.

The stock still trades in a low range, but it sits at an interesting intersection: meme-style retail buzz + a bigger fintech/AI narrative. Anyone here tracking it for short-term momentum, or do you see potential for a longer-term story?
